title: horror smp offcial modpack
description: the offcial modpack for horror smp!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KbVRwpAov3o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Horror SMP Modpack

Welcome to the Horror SMP Modpack — a heavily modded experience built for chaotic fun, exploration, and survival with friends in mind. While the name might say “Horror,” this modpack isn’t just about scares — it’s about the thrill of adventure, the danger lurking underground, and the overpowered gear you’ll use to fight it all off.

This pack includes a wide range of mods, from terrifying ones like Cave Dweller and From the Fog (yes, Herobrine is back) to combat-focused mods like Arsenal (by Doctor4t), TACZ, and Amarite with its insane sword enchantments and dashes. You'll also find Enchancement, a fresh take on enchantments, giving you powerful new mobility and stealth mechanics.

It’s not all gloom and doom, though — Supplementaries and Vanilla Refresh breathe new life into the world with quality-of-life features and aesthetic improvements that keep the vibe immersive without straying too far from Minecraft’s roots.

I don’t own any of the mods included here (besides a few in-progress projects — I’ll update the description once those are ready!). This modpack is meant for group play, whether you're hiding from monsters or chasing your friends with something terrifying in your hands.

So yeah, grab your gear, dive in, and enjoy yourself — this is Horror SMP. Have fun, and don’t forget to bring backup. You’ll need it.  make ur own totem (like the supertj totem:)[make ur own totem](https://spea.cc/totem/) credits to jebgaming for making the icon
